title: cyathea andohahelensis
intro: Cyathea andohahelensis is a species of tree fern endemic to Madagascar, belonging to the family Cyatheaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic and anti-inflammatory compounds that have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Cyathea andohahelensis include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and support skin health. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
